title: uninitialized default_dir_ in NetPins::devirtualize_pins
body:
I was playing with the sanitizers 

```
./configure CFLAGS="-g -O0 -fsanitize=address,undefined" CXXFLAGS="-g -O0 -fsanitize=address,undefined" prefix=/usr LDFLAGS="-fsanitize=address,undefined"
```

I get:

```
netlist.cc:161:24: runtime error: load of value 3200171710, which is not a valid value for type 'DIR'
netlist.cc:166:29: runtime error: load of value 3200171710, which is not a valid value for type 'DIR'
```

It seems to come from the BUFZs

```
module bufz(
output wire q,.
input wire d
);

assign q=d;

endmodule // bufz
```
